name: LA HOMEFARM
description: LA HOMEFARM is a neighborhood grocery and farm market, specializing in fresh, naturally grown produce from small, local farms and beautiful home and garden goods.
address: 3389 Eagle Rock Blvd., Los Angeles, CA 90065

name: LA River Farmers' Market
description: Located at the LA State Historic Park, the LA River Farmers’ Market operates Thursdays and is a gathering place for the community to engage in healthy eating and sustainable living.
address: 1245 N Spring Street, Los Angeles, CA, 90012

name: A Healing Place Wellness Center
description: A Healing Place Wellness Center offers a plethora of services, including yoga, tai chi, reiki, channeled readings, a weight loss group, hypnosis, family constellations, sound healing, meditation and more!
address: 841 Blossom Hill Road suite 112A, San Jose, California, 95123

name: Academy of Chinese Culture and Health Sciences
description: The Academy of Chinese Culture and Health Sciences Community Clinic provides low cost high-quality health care with acupuncture, herbs, and medical massage to patients and opportunities for Academy students to learn clinical techniques from experienced practitioners.
